scripts.bundle:all: npm run bundle:python && npm run bundle:bun && npm run bundle:ingestion
scripts.build:macos: npm run sync-version && npm run bundle:all && npm run preflight:macos && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" tauri build && bash ./scripts/create-dmg.sh
scripts.build:macos:notarized: npm run sync-version && npm run bundle:all && npm run preflight:macos && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" tauri build && bash ./scripts/create-dmg.sh && bash ./scripts/notarize.sh
scripts.build:macos:debug: npm run sync-version && npm run preflight:macos && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" tauri build --debug
